story: On his nineteenth birthday, Greg sits in solitary after a phone call in which Lita’s voice sounded weaker than before. The orange sunset only makes the cell feel smaller. Earlier that shift, Givens had decided that if Greg showed any sincerity, he would try to move him off B Block and into kitchen duty and G.E.D. classes. When the slot opens, Givens hands him a red-velvet cupcake, says, “Happy birthday,” and asks, “What are you doing here? You’re too smart for this place.”
implausible_knowledge: Earlier that shift, Givens had decided that if Greg showed any sincerity, he would try to move him off B Block and into kitchen duty and G.E.D. classes.
question: How is Greg most likely to answer Givens in that moment?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask Givens to move him off B Block.
answer_without_knowledge: Admit that he knows why he ended up there but say he does not know what to do next.
